evals.prompt: Check if I have any running sessions on Mimiry and show me my current balance. My SSH key is at ~/.ssh/mimiry_softlaunch_vibe_test
evals.expected_output: Should authenticate using the bundled auth script, then call both /sessions and /balance endpoints, displaying results clearly

assertions.name: uses_bundled_auth_script
assertions.description: Uses the bundled mimiry-auth.sh script (not hand-rolled auth)

assertions.name: correct_ssh_key_path
assertions.description: Uses the correct SSH key path from the prompt

assertions.name: calls_sessions_endpoint
assertions.description: Calls the /sessions endpoint to list sessions

assertions.name: calls_balance_endpoint
assertions.description: Calls the /balance endpoint to check balance

assertions.name: uses_bearer_token
assertions.description: Uses Bearer token authentication for API calls

evals.prompt: I want to run a PyTorch training job on a GPU on Mimiry. Just use the standard nvidia pytorch image and run a simple MNIST training. My SSH key is ~/.ssh/mimiry_softlaunch_vibe_test
evals.expected_output: Should generate a complete job script using pytorch image with MNIST training command

assertions.name: uses_bundled_auth
assertions.description: Uses the bundled auth script for authentication

assertions.name: uses_pytorch_image
assertions.description: Uses an NVIDIA PyTorch container image

assertions.name: creates_session
assertions.description: Creates a session via POST to /sessions

assertions.name: includes_ssh_public_key
assertions.description: Includes ssh_public_key in session creation payload

assertions.name: sets_auto_terminate
assertions.description: Sets auto_terminate to true for batch job

assertions.name: includes_polling_loop
assertions.description: Includes a polling loop to wait for session to be running

assertions.name: includes_ssh_command
assertions.description: Shows SSH connection command once session is running

assertions.name: has_error_handling
assertions.description: Includes error handling for common failure modes

evals.prompt: I want to launch an interactive GPU session on Mimiry that I can SSH into for experimentation. I need a CUDA environment. My key is at ~/.ssh/mimiry_softlaunch_vibe_test
evals.expected_output: Should create interactive session with CUDA image, no command, auto_terminate false, and show SSH command

assertions.name: uses_bundled_auth
assertions.description: Uses the bundled auth script for authentication

assertions.name: uses_cuda_image
assertions.description: Uses an NVIDIA CUDA container image

assertions.name: no_command_or_null_command
assertions.description: Does NOT include a command field, or sets it to null (interactive session)
assertions.check: run_job.sh should either omit 'command' from the JSON payload or set it to null

assertions.name: auto_terminate_false
assertions.description: Sets auto_terminate to false for interactive session

assertions.name: ssh_enabled
assertions.description: Enables SSH access

assertions.name: shows_ssh_connection
assertions.description: Displays SSH connection command to the user

assertions.name: includes_terminate_reminder
assertions.description: Reminds user to terminate when done (billing concern)
assertions.check: run_job.sh or explanation.md mentions terminating or billing
